system.notes: Requires two or more generators, placed and activated or deactivated as a Full Action, which also activates any linked generators. Generates a wall of force 1.5m high and up to 8m long between linked generators in a line that acts as cover. If a wall section overloads, only the section between two generators shuts down; the rest are unaffected. Protection Rating 65%.
